title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin describes a workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and code, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and Opus again for integrations and deployment. He positions Gemini as superior for frontend aesthetics and Opus for general capability, orchestrated through Archon.
